content: Fix 1: Cambiar SCORES24_SEARCH_FALLBACK a opt-OUT (default activado), documentar en plan.md
Fix 2: TTL index Mongo en scores24_discarded_review_cache.expires_at (purga automatica)
Fix 3.A: Crear football_structural_value_review.py (orchestrator que llama a 4-5 modulos estructurales existentes)
Fix 3.B: Anadir post-processor en market_guardrail: SOFT_DISCARD + structural_support>=75 -> WATCHLIST_ODDS_NEEDED (no terminal)
Fix 3.C: Anadir reason codes nuevos (10 codes del spec)
Fix 3.D: Frontend - extender Scores24ReviewBadge / DiscardedRow para mostrar structural_analysis + WATCHLIST_ODDS_NEEDED state
